title: Mass Emails not sending
excerpt: Hi, I just wondered if anyone else has tried to send a mass email via Monday CRM today (Wednesday 22nd January 2025)? I have tried a number of times today and keep getting a notification that Monday was unable to send it…

posts.author: PeteC (Peter Clamp)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi, I just wondered if anyone else has tried to send a mass email via Monday CRM today (Wednesday 22nd January 2025)? I have tried a number of times today and keep getting a notification that Monday was unable to send it. I have used this feature successfully in the past, I tried sending an individual email (from opening the contact page and clicking Email) and it sent fine?

Thank you

posts.author: sirah (Sirah E)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hi @PeteC Sirah here from Mindflows - this could be a internal issue. Have you tried contacting support? You may reach Monday Support through here https://support.monday.com/hc/en-us

I hope this helps!
